mobile.heroSubtitle: AI training for lifters who treat the gym like a mission—not a hobby.

desktop.headline: Smarter AI Workout Programming.
desktop.subtitle: Built for lifters who care about recovery, fatigue management and real progression.
desktop.betaDescription: Early access is limited while GRNDN's programming engine is being refined for serious lifters.
desktop.accessSavedDevice: Your beta access is saved on this device.
desktop.waitlistDescription: Join the waitlist for launch updates and creator beta drops.
desktop.footerCopy: GRNDN is being built for lifters who want intelligent programming, not random workouts. Closed beta access helps us keep quality high while the coaching engine matures.

aiProtocols.title: AI protocols
aiProtocols.line: Programs built around your body—not random workouts.

fatigueAware.title: Fatigue-aware
fatigueAware.line: Smart volume so you recover and still progress.

yourStyle.title: Your style
yourStyle.line: Hypertrophy, strength, or V-taper. You choose.

recoveryLogic.title: Recovery logic
recoveryLogic.line: Training that respects sleep, stress, and limits.

premiumPdfs.title: Premium PDFs
premiumPdfs.line: Export programs that look pro in the gym.

aiGeneration.title: AI Workout Generation
aiGeneration.description: Structured protocols built around your body, goal and schedule.

fatigueProgramming.title: Fatigue-Aware Programming
fatigueProgramming.description: Software guardrails reduce redundant high-fatigue overlap.

vTaperStrength.title: V-Taper & Strength Styles
vTaperStrength.description: Choose the training philosophy that matches your outcome.

recoveryLogic.title: Smart Recovery Logic
recoveryLogic.description: Activity, limitations and pace inform recoverable training.

premiumPdf.title: Premium PDF Programs
premiumPdf.description: Export clean, polished training programs built for real use.

welcome.subtitle: GRNDN builds adaptive protocols tailored to your body, schedule, and goals.
welcome.setup_time: Takes only 2 minutes to set up

age.title: Your age
age.description: We use this to tune volume, recovery, and progression.

weight.title: Body weight
weight.description: Enter your current weight in kilograms.
weight.label: Weight (kg)

sex.title: About you
sex.description: Helps calibrate recovery and programming style. You can update this later.
sex.maleHint: Used only to tune evidence-based training variables
sex.femaleHint: Used only to tune evidence-based training variables

activity.title: How active are you outside the gym?
activity.description: Daily movement changes recovery demands and how much training volume you can realistically tolerate.
activity.disclaimer: Informational only. GRNDN uses this to reason about recovery and fatigue, not to prescribe calories or meal plans.

experience.title: Training experience
experience.description: This helps us calibrate your workouts

goal.title: What's your goal?
goal.description: Select one or more fitness objectives

targetWeight.title: What target weight are you aiming for?
targetWeight.description: This helps calibrate fatigue and recovery expectations for fat-loss training.
targetWeight.label: Target weight (kg)
targetWeight.hint: Enter a realistic target below your current {weight} kg body weight.

weightLossPace.title: What fat-loss pace fits your life?
weightLossPace.description: Pace changes how conservative your training volume and systemic fatigue should be.

trainingStyle.title: What training style fits you best?
trainingStyle.description: Choose the training philosophy that best matches your goals and preferred experience.

muscleGroups.title: Priority muscles
muscleGroups.description: Which areas do you want to focus on?

equipment.title: Available equipment
equipment.description: Select all the gear you have access to

injuries.title: Any limitations?
injuries.description: We'll modify exercises to keep you safe

frequency.title: Weekly frequency
frequency.description: How many days per week can you train?

duration.title: Session duration
duration.description: How long can you workout each session?

summary.title: You're all set
summary.description: Review your profile, then generate your GRNDN protocol.
summary.readyDescription: Metrics ({height} cm, {weight} kg, age {age}) plus your {frequency}-day schedule shape a {duration}-minute adaptive plan.
summary.adjustAnytime: You can adjust these settings anytime

lightly_active.title: Lightly Active
lightly_active.description: Some walking and light daily movement.

very_active.title: Very Active
very_active.description: Physically demanding work or high daily activity.

athlete_level.title: Athlete-Level Activity
athlete_level.description: Very high physical output and recovery demands.

beginner.title: Beginner
beginner.description: New to fitness or returning after a long break

lose-weight.title: Lose Weight
lose-weight.description: Burn fat and get lean with targeted cardio and strength training

build-muscle.title: Build Muscle
build-muscle.description: Gain strength and size with progressive overload programs

get-fit.title: Get Fit
get-fit.description: Improve overall fitness, stamina, and daily energy levels

stay-healthy.title: Stay Healthy
stay-healthy.description: Maintain your current fitness with balanced workouts

compete.title: Compete
compete.description: Train for athletic performance and competition

aggressive.title: Aggressive
aggressive.description: Faster fat loss with higher recovery demands.

hypertrophy.title: Hypertrophy
hypertrophy.description: Balanced muscle growth and bodybuilding-focused training.

strength.title: Strength
strength.description: Heavier compounds, lower reps and performance-focused progression.

v_taper.title: Aesthetic / V-Taper
v_taper.description: Prioritize wide lats, capped delts and upper-body aesthetics.

powerbuilding.title: Powerbuilding
powerbuilding.description: Blend strength progression with bodybuilding hypertrophy work.

minimalist.title: Minimalist
minimalist.description: Lower volume, high-efficiency training with minimal junk volume.

generation.error: Could not generate your workout plan.

results.missingPlan: Generate a protocol from onboarding first, or your session may have expired.

programs.title: My Programs
programs.libraryDescription: Access generated GRNDN programs from any device after signing in with your email magic link.
programs.signInDescription: No password required. We'll send a one-tap magic link to unlock your saved programs.
programs.checkInboxDescription: Open the link and you'll land back here automatically.
programs.emptyDescription: Generate a protocol, then tap "Save My Program" on the results page.

auth.save_description: Enter your email and we'll send a secure magic link. No password, no account setup.
auth.magic_link_sent: Open the magic link on this device and your current program will save automatically.

workout.pdfExportFailed: Could not export PDF. Please try again.

errors.supabaseSaveNotConfigured: Supabase is not configured for saving programs.
errors.supabaseProgramsNotConfigured: Supabase is not configured for saved programs.
